messages.content: I am starting a fictional project called Harbor: a small online workshop where local artists can share process notes and receive peer feedback.
The working title used to be Canvas, but Harbor is the final name from now on.
For project communication, I prefer concise weekly written updates every Friday morning, with no more than five bullet points.
The fictional onboarding session is scheduled for May 6, 2031 at 10:00 in Europe/Madrid.
Do not include artists' contact details, personal addresses, or private messages in shared project summaries.
The first prototype review is planned for May 20, 2031. The goal is to check whether people can publish a process note and request feedback without assistance.
Success for the first release means that five fictional artists complete the onboarding exercise and leave at least one useful peer comment each.
